title: Bundle of Triplewax Wheel Cleaner 500ml and Alloy Wheel Brush Powerful Spray for Brake Dust, Dirt and Grime Removal Safe for All Alloy & Chrome Wheels
features: EFFORTLESS WHEEL CLEANING: Triplewax Wheel Cleaner quickly removes baked-on brake dust, dirt, and road grime, making wheel maintenance fast and easy.
SIMPLE & HASSLE-FREE APPLICATION: Spray, agitate with the included alloy wheel brush, and rinse no scrubbing or complicated steps required.
POWERFUL FORMULA: Breaks down stubborn deposits and tough grime instantly, leaving wheels sparkling clean with minimal effort.
SAFE FOR ALL WHEEL TYPES: Works on alloys, steel, anodized rims, split rims, and plastic trims without causing damage.
GENTLE YET EFFECTIVE: Tough on dirt but gentle on surfaces, providing a deep clean while protecting the finish of your wheels.
description: Keep your wheels looking showroom-ready with the Triplewax Wheel Cleaner 500ml + Alloy Wheel Brush Bundle. Designed for effortless cleaning, this powerful wheel cleaner quickly dissolves baked-on brake dust, dirt, and road grime, saving you time and effort while maintaining a flawless finish. The included alloy wheel brush ensures thorough cleaning, reaching into tight spaces and intricate designs with ease. Simply spray the cleaner, agitate with the brush, and rinse leaving your wheels sparkling clean without scrubbing.
